note_en: Predictions are my (Opus 4.8) own reads — for entertainment, not betting advice. Where it matters, my picks now weigh knockout-bracket incentives (seeding, who-avoids-whom) rather than just paper strength. Scratch a panel to reveal my call.
note_zh: 预测为我（Opus 4.8）的个人研判——仅供娱乐，不构成博彩建议。在关键场次，预测已纳入淘汰赛对阵的博弈（签位、避强逻辑），而非单纯纸面实力。刮开面板即可揭晓我的判断。

record.note_en: Opus match-outcome calls, scored from Matchday 3 (group Round 3) onward — the point from which a verified prediction-vs-result ledger exists. Updated each day as new results land.
record.note_zh: 自第三轮（小组赛末轮）起对 Opus 的胜负预测计分——这是有据可查的预测对照赛果起点。每日随新赛果更新。

champions.reason_en: Qualified Group I (6 pts); Mbappé firing; faces Norway today for top spot and a kinder R32 path.
champions.reason_zh: 已锁定 I 组（6 分）；姆巴佩状态火热；今日战挪威争头名与更优的 32 强签位。

champions.reason_en: Qualified Group H; must hold top vs Uruguay June 27 (2nd H draws Argentina). Yamal's edge.
champions.reason_zh: 已锁定 H 组；6 月 27 日须力保头名战乌拉圭（次席将遇阿根廷）。亚马尔锋芒。

champions.reason_en: Won Group J; rotates vs Jordan June 28 with Messi rested; awaits a R32 opponent.
champions.reason_zh: 已夺 J 组头名；6 月 28 日战约旦轮换、雪藏梅西；静待 32 强对手。

champions.reason_en: Won Group C; meets Japan in R32 June 29; Vinícius and the attack humming.
champions.reason_zh: 夺得 C 组头名；6 月 29 日 32 强战日本；维尼修斯与攻击线状态火热。

champions.reason_en: Group L lead (4-2 Croatia); faces Panama June 27 to seal top; Kane scoring.
champions.reason_zh: L 组领先（4-2 克罗地亚）；6 月 27 日战巴拿马锁定头名；凯恩进球。

champions.reason_en: Won Group E despite a 2-1 stumble to Ecuador; gritty, physical edge into the knockouts.
champions.reason_zh: 尽管 1-2 不敌厄瓜多尔仍夺 E 组头名；坚韧、对抗占优地进入淘汰赛。

champions.reason_en: Won Group F (7 pts, 3-1 Tunisia); possession mastery; R32 vs Morocco June 30.
champions.reason_zh: 夺得 F 组头名（7 分，3-1 突尼斯）；控球大师；6 月 30 日 32 强战摩洛哥。

players.name: Lionel Messi
players.reason_en: All-time WC goal record holder; Argentina top Group J; rests vs Jordan, eyes deep run.
players.reason_zh: 世界杯历史进球纪录保持者；阿根廷 J 组头名；战约旦休整，志在深入。

players.name: Kylian Mbappé
players.reason_en: France chase top vs Norway today; multiple goals already; razor form.
players.reason_zh: 法国今日战挪威争头名；已多次破门；状态锋利。

players.name: Erling Haaland
players.reason_en: Golden Boot lead (6 goals); Norway face France today for top spot.
players.reason_zh: 领跑金靴（6 球）；挪威今日战法国争头名。

players.name: Harry Kane
players.reason_en: Brace vs Croatia; England top Group L; faces Panama June 27.
players.reason_zh: 克罗地亚战梅开二度；英格兰领跑 L 组；6 月 27 日战巴拿马。

players.name: Lamine Yamal
players.reason_en: Spain qualified; creative spark; faces Uruguay June 27 with top spot at stake.
players.reason_zh: 西班牙出线；创造力出众；6 月 27 日战乌拉圭争头名。

players.name: Mohamed Salah
players.reason_en: Egypt top Group G (4 pts); faces Iran June 27 to seal; African dark horse.
players.reason_zh: 埃及领跑 G 组（4 分）；6 月 27 日战伊朗争出线；非洲黑马。

fixtures.reason_en: Decider with teeth: winner (1I) gets a 3rd-placed team in R32 and dodges Brazil's quarter; loser (2I) drifts toward Brazil. France's ceiling edges Norway.
fixtures.reason_zh: 火药味十足的头名战：胜者（I 组头名）32 强对阵小组第三并避开巴西半区；败者（次席）滑向巴西。法国上限压过挪威。

fixtures.reason_en: Dead rubber — both eliminated; only pride and minutes at stake. Senegal's quality should tell.
fixtures.reason_zh: 荣誉之战——双方均已淘汰；只剩颜面与状态。塞内加尔实力应占优。

fixtures.reason_en: Twist: 2nd in H draws Argentina in R32, so Spain field a strong XI to hold top; a Uruguay win would lift them above. Tight — draw.
fixtures.reason_zh: 玄机：H 组次席将在 32 强遇阿根廷，西班牙派强阵保头名；乌拉圭若胜则反超。胶着——平局。

fixtures.reason_en: Cape Verde chase 2nd, but the prize is Argentina in R32; Saudi low after 0-4. CV edge a tense one.
fixtures.reason_zh: 佛得角争次席，但奖品是 32 强碰阿根廷；沙特 0-4 后低迷。佛得角紧张取胜。

fixtures.reason_en: Egypt push for top to keep clear of Argentina's quarter (2G's fate); Iran must win to chase 2nd. Egypt narrowly.
fixtures.reason_zh: 埃及争头名以避开阿根廷的 1/4 区（次席的命运）；伊朗须胜方能争次席。埃及险胜。

fixtures.reason_en: Belgium win-or-out — advancing earns the tough Argentina-side route, but they must take it. NZ spoilers only.
fixtures.reason_zh: 比利时不胜则亡——出线即踏上通向阿根廷的艰难半区，但别无选择。新西兰仅作搅局。

fixtures.reason_en: England seal top, though 1L ironically points toward a Brazil quarter; only a loss to Panama avoids it, which won't happen. Hosts rotate, still win.
fixtures.reason_zh: 英格兰锁定头名，讽刺的是 L 组头名通向巴西的 1/4 区；唯一避开的办法是输给巴拿马，这不会发生。英格兰轮换仍胜。

fixtures.reason_en: Straight shootout for 2nd — and the runner-up lands the friendlier half, clear of Brazil and Argentina. Modrić's Croatia edge Ghana.
fixtures.reason_zh: 争次席的直接对话——次席反而落入更轻松的半区，避开巴西与阿根廷。莫德里奇的克罗地亚力压加纳。

fixtures.reason_en: Tactical chess: topping K brings an easy R32 but a brutal Argentina-then-Brazil road; 2nd dodges both. Neither truly chases the win — cagey draw.
fixtures.reason_zh: 战术博弈：K 组头名 32 强签位轻松，却要走阿根廷接巴西的鬼门关；次席两者皆避。双方都不真想赢——谨慎言和。

fixtures.reason_en: Marginal stakes — DRC cling to faint best-third hopes, Uzbekistan out. DRC edge.
fixtures.reason_zh: 意义有限——刚果（金）寄望渺茫的最佳第三，乌兹别克斯坦出局。刚果险胜。

fixtures.reason_en: Win-or-out for 2nd — and the winner's prize is Argentina in R32. Algeria edge a tight, nervy one.
fixtures.reason_zh: 争次席生死战——胜者的奖品是 32 强对阵阿根廷。阿尔及利亚在紧张中险胜。

fixtures.reason_en: Top seed secured, so Argentina rest Messi and starters; a rotated XI still beats eliminated Jordan, but by a slimmer margin.
fixtures.reason_zh: 头名已定，阿根廷雪藏梅西与主力；轮换阵容仍能击败已淘汰的约旦，但分差收窄。

fixtures.reason_en: R32 opener (A2 v B2). Canada's co-host depth and tempo edge plucky South Africa, fresh off shocking South Korea. Tight, but Canada's quality tells.
fixtures.reason_zh: 32 强揭幕战（A 组次席对 B 组次席）。东道主加拿大阵容厚度与节奏压过爆冷淘汰韩国的南非。胶着，但加拿大实力更胜。

fixtures.reason_en: The seeding trap sprung: Japan's 2nd in F drew the group-stage standout. Brazil's firepower should prevail, but Japan's press makes it a real test.
fixtures.reason_zh: 签位陷阱成真：日本 F 组次席撞上小组赛表现抢眼的巴西。巴西火力应占优，但日本的逼抢会带来真正考验。

groups.reason_en: FINAL: Mexico win group (3-0 Czechia); South Africa stun South Korea 1-0 to grab second on 4 pts. South Korea & Czechia eliminated.
groups.reason_zh: 已定：墨西哥头名（3-0 捷克）；南非 1-0 爆冷韩国，以 4 分抢得次席出线。韩国与捷克淘汰。

groups.reason_en: FINAL: Switzerland win group beating Canada 3-1 (7 pts); Canada through second. Bosnia & Qatar eliminated.
groups.reason_zh: 已定：瑞士 3-1 力克加拿大夺头名（7 分）；加拿大次席出线。波黑与卡塔尔淘汰。

groups.reason_en: FINAL: Brazil win group (3-0 Scotland, Vinícius brace); Morocco second (4-2 Haiti). Scotland & Haiti eliminated.
groups.reason_zh: 已定：巴西头名（3-0 苏格兰，维尼修斯梅开二度）；摩洛哥次席（4-2 海地）。苏格兰与海地淘汰。

groups.reason_en: FINAL: USA win group (6 pts) despite a 3-2 shock loss to Turkey; Australia second (4 pts, GD edges Paraguay after 0-0); Paraguay third (4 pts) in the best-third hunt. USA meet Bosnia in R32. Turkey eliminated.
groups.reason_zh: 已定：美国头名（6 分），尽管 2-3 爆冷负土耳其；澳大利亚次席（4 分，0-0 后净胜球压过巴拉圭）；巴拉圭第三（4 分）争最佳第三。美国 32 强战波黑。土耳其淘汰。

groups.reason_en: FINAL: Germany win group (6 pts, GD) despite a 2-1 loss to Ecuador; Ivory Coast second (6 pts, 2-0 Curaçao); Ecuador third (4 pts) advance via best-third. Curaçao eliminated.
groups.reason_zh: 已定：德国头名（6 分，净胜球），尽管 1-2 负厄瓜多尔；科特迪瓦次席（6 分，2-0 库拉索）；厄瓜多尔第三（4 分）以最佳第三出线。库拉索淘汰。

groups.reason_en: FINAL: Netherlands win group (7 pts, 3-1 Tunisia); Japan second (5 pts) — and so draw Brazil in R32; Sweden third (4 pts) advance after 1-1 with Japan. Tunisia eliminated.
groups.reason_zh: 已定：荷兰头名（7 分，3-1 突尼斯）；日本次席（5 分）——因此 32 强撞上巴西；瑞典第三（4 分，1-1 战平日本）出线。突尼斯淘汰。

groups.reason_en: Egypt 4 pts lead and want top to avoid Argentina's quarter (2G's fate); Belgium 2 pts must win to advance. Round 3 June 27.
groups.reason_zh: 埃及 4 分领先并争头名以避开阿根廷的 1/4 区（次席命运）；比利时 2 分须胜方能出线。第三轮 6 月 27 日。

groups.reason_en: Spain qualified (4 pts ✓) and must hold top — 2nd H draws Argentina in R32; Uruguay 2 pts & Cape Verde 2 pts chase. Round 3 June 27.
groups.reason_zh: 西班牙已出线（4 分✓）且须保头名——H 组次席将在 32 强遇阿根廷；乌拉圭 2 分、佛得角 2 分紧追。第三轮 6 月 27 日。

groups.reason_en: France 6 pts & Norway 6 pts both qualified; June 26 decider is high-stakes — winner gets a 3rd-placer in R32 and dodges Brazil's quarter, loser drifts toward Brazil. Senegal 0 pts.
groups.reason_zh: 法国 6 分、挪威 6 分双双出线；6 月 26 日头名战意义重大——胜者 32 强对阵小组第三并避开巴西半区，败者滑向巴西。塞内加尔 0 分。

groups.reason_en: Argentina qualified top (6 pts ✓) and rotate vs Jordan; Austria 3 pts & Algeria 3 pts meet for second June 28 — but the runner-up's prize is Argentina in R32. Jordan eliminated.
groups.reason_zh: 阿根廷已锁定头名（6 分✓）并对约旦轮换；奥地利 3 分与阿尔及利亚 3 分 6 月 28 日争次席——但次席奖品是 32 强对阵阿根廷。约旦已淘汰。

groups.reason_en: Colombia 6 pts & Portugal 4 pts both through. June 27 'decider' is a trap: topping K means an easy R32 but an Argentina-then-Brazil road, while 2nd dodges both — expect a cagey draw. Uzbekistan eliminated.
groups.reason_zh: 哥伦比亚 6 分、葡萄牙 4 分均出线。6 月 27 日的'头名战'实为陷阱：夺头名 32 强轻松却要走阿根廷接巴西，次席两者皆避——预计谨慎言和。乌兹已淘汰。

groups.reason_en: England 4 pts lead (1L points toward a Brazil quarter, but they'll win anyway); Ghana 4 pts & Croatia 3 pts chase second — the runner-up lands the friendlier half. Panama eliminated. Round 3 June 27.
groups.reason_zh: 英格兰 4 分领先（L 组头名通向巴西 1/4 区，但仍会取胜）；加纳 4 分、克罗地亚 3 分争次席——次席落入更轻松半区。巴拿马已淘汰。第三轮 6 月 27 日。
